title: Midnight Dumpling Frites Basket
description: A crispy frites basket filled with steaming hot dumplings, perfect for a midnight snack.
instructions: Preheat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Cut the frites into 1-inch (2.5 cm) sticks. Fry in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
In a separate pan, steam the dumplings according to package instructions. Alternatively, boil or pan-fry them.
Season the frites with salt to taste.
Drizzle soy sauce over the dumplings (if using).
Place 4-6 frites in the bottom of a small basket or cone.
Add 4-6 dumplings on top of the frites.
Garnish with chopped green onions (if using).
